sources: Eurostat ilc_di01 (equivalised disposable income by decile, IT, 2023)
Eurostat hbs_str_t223 (mean consumption expenditure by COICOP, IT, 2020 wave)
Eurostat tec00131 / nasa_10_ki (household saving rate, IT)
notes: Deciles are annual EQUIVALISED net disposable income in EUR (OECD-modified scale). Category shares are remapped from COICOP divisions to the app's expense categories.
